---
title: "7. T-distribution"
author: "Sharon Kinkenberg & Johnny van Doorn"
date: "TODO 2026"
footer: "Scientific & Statistical Reasoning"
format:
  revealjs:
    output-ext: slide.html
    css: ../../ajohnson.css
  html: default
css: ../../ajohnson.css
---

```{r child="t-distribution.qmd"}
```

```{r child="../../footer.qmd"}
```
